task_completion.description: Open the chart for patient Margaret Thompson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's name 'Margaret Thompson' and DOB '04/22/1958' should be visible in the active patient banner or chart header.

task_completion.description: Open today's encounter for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active encounter screen with today's date should be visible in the charting interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Review of Systems (ROS) section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Review of Systems' or 'ROS' section should be open and active in the encounter interface.

task_completion.description: Document findings for Constitutional, Eyes, ENT, Cardiovascular, Respiratory, and Gastrointestinal systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkboxes marked or text entered in the ROS fields matching the required findings: fatigue, 5lb weight loss (Constitutional); no vision changes/pain (Eyes); dry mouth, no hearing loss (ENT); no chest pain/palpitations (Cardiovascular); no SOB/cough (Respiratory); intermittent nausea, no abd pain (GI).

task_completion.description: Document findings for Genitourinary, Musculoskeletal, Neurological, Psychiatric, Skin, and Endocrine systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for checkboxes marked or text entered in the ROS fields matching the required findings: no urinary frequency/dysuria (GU); bilateral joint pain hands/knees, 30 min morning stiffness (Musculoskeletal); headaches 3-4x/week, no numbness/tingling (Neurological); difficulty sleeping, no depression (Psychiatric); new rash on forearms (Skin); no heat/cold intolerance (Endocrine).

task_completion.description: Save the Review of Systems documentation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message, the ROS section appearing as completed/saved, or the encounter being signed/saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (e.g., Firefox) navigating the NOSH EHR GUI, not terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual NOSH application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display the NOSH ChartingSystem layout, menus, and patient banner, rather than a generic text editor or a mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Margaret Thompson (DOB: 04/22/1958). Encounter Date: Today. Application: NOSH ChartingSystem at http://localhost/login. Required ROS findings: Constitutional (Fatigue, weight loss 5 lbs/2 mos), Eyes (No vision changes/pain), ENT (Dry mouth, no hearing loss), Cardiovascular (No chest pain/palpitations), Respiratory (No SOB/cough), Gastrointestinal (Intermittent nausea, no abd pain), Genitourinary (No urinary frequency/dysuria), Musculoskeletal (Bilateral joint pain hands/knees, morning stiffness 30 mins), Neurological (Headaches 3-4x/week, no numbness/tingling), Psychiatric (Difficulty sleeping, no depression), Skin (New rash on forearms), Endocrine (No heat/cold intolerance).
